meta.method: team unit strength = SNAP-WEIGHTED MEAN of PAA-per-play over the projected 2026 roster (movers carry rate+snaps to 2026 team; rookies via draft-round prior calibrated to 2025 class + DB college blend). Replaces the raw Points-Saved SUM. 32-team Hazen percentiles.
limitations: SIS = top-200 leaderboard, 2025 only; rookie n=9-14/unit -> round curves are shrunk priors
2024 NFL Value (2nd rookie class) needs a SIS pull

known_gaps.reason: Absent from SIS coverage Points Saved top-200 in BOTH 2024 and 2025. 2025: injured (211 coverage snaps, PFF grade 57.7). 2024: healthy and elite by PFF (grade 91.5, 781 snaps) yet SIS PS still did not rank him top-200 -- SIS Points Saved structurally discounts his gambling / ball-hawk safety style. 2026 availability reported UNCERTAIN.
known_gaps.effect: DET coverage is not credited for a healthy-Joseph outcome. If he returns to 2024 form, DET's coverage unit would rank materially higher than the SIS-based number shows.

recovery_policy.rule: A player who was a GOOD 2024 starter (PFF>=74, >=snap_min snaps) with a POSITIVE SIS 2024 rate, absent from SIS-2025 and having played <500 total 2025 def snaps (injured/DNP), is folded onto his 2026 team at 2024 rate x 0.65. Healthy-but-SIS-omitted -> flagged not recovered; PFF-elite absent both SIS years -> flagged.
